chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Misc. Application No. 767 of 2024 (Muhammad Jamal Vs. The SSP Complaint Cell and others) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case 28.11.2025 Mr. Muhammad Haroon Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Wajid Gul Advocate for the Respondent No. 1 to 6 Ms. Rubina Qadir, Addl: P.G.-.-.-.-.-. After arguing the matter at some length, the learned counsel for the Applicant does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application on the ground that he will approach the competent Court of law or appropriate functionaries for redressal of his grievance regarding the new facts. On the other hand, the learned counsel for Respondent No.1/proposed accused raised an objection on the ground that the wife of the Applicant, namely Mst. Asma, had filed an application on the same alleged offence, which was dismissed by the learned Justice of Peace. He contended that this Criminal Miscellaneous Application pertains to the same series of offences; while the wife appeared earlier, the husband is now appearing. Therefore, both this application and the one filed by the Applicant, Muhammad Jamal, are misconceived and liable to be dismissed. Conversely, the learned Addl:PG has no objection, subject to the liberty of any person to address his grievance before the appropriate forum. Considering the above, it is noted that the application filed by Mst. Asma was dismissed by the Justice of Peace, and such order has not been assailed before this Court. The Applicant has now filed an application on the same series of offences, which was earlier dismissed on account of non-prosecution by the Justice of Peace.

Asma was dismissed by the Justice of Peace, and such order has not been assailed before this Court. The Applicant has now filed an application on the same series of offences, which was earlier dismissed on account of non-prosecution by the Justice of Peace. In such circumstances, any fresh application on the same series of facts is not maintainable. However, if any new facts or circumstances arise, every citizen is at liberty to file applications in accordance with law. Accordingly, the Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE
